title: Paper Art
subtitle: Intricate hand-made paper art pieces. Delicate, detailed, and designed to delight.

items.name: Butterfly
items.description: Hand-cut paper butterflies with incredible detail and dimension. Each wing is individually crafted and layered for a stunning 3D effect.

images.alt: Butterflies paper cut art wall hanging

items.name: Fox Ornament
items.description: Detailed paper lighthouses capturing the beauty and romance of coastal beacons. Multi-layered construction creates depth and shadow.

items.name: Cat
items.description: Charming paper art cats with personality and poise. Each piece captures feline grace through precision cutting and layering.
